usage.name: Once Per Session
usage.description: Can only be used once per gaming session

usage.name: Once Per Scene
usage.description: Can only be used once per combat or major scene

usage.name: Limited Uses
usage.description: Can be used X times per session (specify)

usage.name: Cooldown
usage.description: Must wait X rounds between uses

activation.name: Requires Setup
activation.description: Must spend an action preparing before use

activation.name: Channeling
activation.description: Must maintain concentration, can be interrupted

activation.name: Ritual Casting
activation.description: Takes 10 minutes to activate outside combat

targeting.name: Friendly Fire
targeting.description: Cannot distinguish between allies and enemies

targeting.name: Line of Sight
targeting.description: Requires clear line of sight to target

environmental.name: Outdoors Only
environmental.description: Cannot be used indoors or underground

environmental.name: Water Required
environmental.description: Requires access to significant water source

environmental.name: Specific Terrain
environmental.description: Only works in chosen terrain type

physical.name: Self Damage
physical.description: Deals damage to user when activated

physical.name: Immobilized
physical.description: Cannot move while effect is active

mental.name: Emotional Trigger
mental.description: Only usable when experiencing strong emotion

mental.name: Berserk
mental.description: Cannot distinguish friend from foe while active

mental.name: Concentration
mental.description: Ends if you take damage or are distracted
